product.name: 200 Count Disposable Spa Facial Headbands with Convenient Closure,White Stretch Facial Headwraps Soft for Facials Skincare Spa
features: PREMIUM MATERIAL:Made from premium non-woven fabric, our disposable head wraps are soft, breathable, and lightweight.They offer a comfortable fit with excellent elasticity, effectively keeping your hair in place
ONE SIZE FITS MOST:Featuring an adjustable magic tape, these head wraps fit head sizes from 18-28 inches (40-70 cm).They stretch comfortably to keep your hair neat and out of your face

PERFECT FOR MAKEUP AND SKINCARE:Our disposable spa headbands keep your hair away from makeup and skincare products. With plenty in each pack, they meet daily needs, simplify your routine,and help reduce laundry costs. Easy to use and convenient

VERSATILE USE:These headbands are ideal for showers, spas, face washing, makeup, and facial care. Perfect for workouts, sports, and activities like yoga, running, and more. Great for home, spas, hair salons, and beauty salons

PACKAGE INCLUDES: Each order includes 200 disposable stretch headbands, perfect for facial treatments. They fit well, covering a large area of the ears. Each headband is individually wrapped for single use
